name: The Work Loft Silom
field_highlight: Reliable backup option for online teachers and calls.

name: The Hive Thonglor
field_highlight: Strong WiFi and ergonomic seating — holds focus well.
micro_watch_out: Day pass rates add up over a full week.

name: Sarnies Bangkok
field_highlight: Usually calmer for focused work before lunch.
micro_watch_out: Can become busy in peak brunch hours.

name: Artis Coffee
field_highlight: Multiple roasters on rotation — serious coffee without the attitude.
micro_watch_out: Small space, not suited for marathon sessions.

name: Holey Artisan Bakery
field_highlight: Bangkok's best bagels — solid working breakfast spot.
micro_watch_out: Pastries sell out by mid-morning on weekends.

name: Kajohn
field_highlight: Pad see ew at prices that make tourist restaurants feel absurd.
micro_watch_out: Cash only. Very busy at lunch.

name: GO Laundry PX
field_highlight: Convenient pickup service — reliable for long stays.
micro_watch_out: Premium pricing compared to local laundries.

name: Wat Arun Viewing Point
field_highlight: Excellent quick sunset reset after a work day.
micro_watch_out: Can get crowded near golden hour.

name: Mahanakhon Skywalk
field_highlight: Unobstructed 360° views — worth doing once at sunset.
micro_watch_out: Skip on cloudy days. Entry is pricey at ~฿875.
